server.name: brushfit-agentstore
server.description: MCP server for BrushFit AgentStore. Discover and purchase the BrushFit 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide — a 31-page PDF with 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises. Supports x402 payment protocol (USDC on Base blockchain).

tools.name: get_product_info
tools.description: Get full product details, pricing, payment methods, and purchase instructions for the BrushFit guide. Returns JSON with product metadata, pricing ($19.99 USD), and available payment flows (x402 and Stripe).

tools.name: purchase_brushfit
tools.description: Purchase the BrushFit PDF via x402 protocol. First call returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements. Sign a USDC transfer on Base (chain ID 8453), then retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header to receive the PDF. Use @x402/fetch wrapFetchWithPayment() to automate the flow.

payment_signature.description: Signed USDC transfer authorization for x402 payment. Omit on first call to receive payment requirements.

tools.name: get_free_sample
tools.description: Download the free BrushFit sample PDF containing Legs and Core exercise sections. No payment or authentication required. Great for evaluating the product before purchase.

resources.name: product_catalog
resources.description: Complete product catalog for BrushFit AgentStore, including product details, exercise lists, and program structure.

resources.name: pricing_info
resources.description: Current pricing and available payment methods for the BrushFit guide. Price: $19.99 USD. Accepts USDC via x402 or cards via Stripe.

resources.name: openapi_spec
resources.description: OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification for the BrushFit AgentStore API.

resources.name: free_sample
resources.description: Free sample PDF with Legs and Core exercises from the BrushFit guide.

authentication.description: Payment via x402 protocol — HTTP 402 flow with USDC on Base blockchain. No API keys or authentication tokens required. Payment is made per-transaction via signed USDC transfer.

prompts.name: discover_brushfit
prompts.description: Discover the BrushFit product and learn how to purchase it
prompts.template: Use the get_product_info tool to learn about BrushFit, a 31-page fitness PDF with 22 toothbrush exercises. Then use get_free_sample to preview it, or purchase_brushfit to buy it via x402.
